message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice, and this conversation is being logged. We are discussing the account ending in 1184. To verify identity, please confirm the last 4 digits of the phone number on file. You stated you will not be able to pay this month, and I will note that as a hardship signal.
0002. I lost my job, so I can’t pay right now.
Understood. I will note that you lost your job. Do you expect any income within 21 days?
No, I don’t expect any income in the next 21 days.
Understood. I will note ongoing hardship and no expected income within 21 days. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

Borrower stated they cannot pay this month, lost their job, and do not expect any income within 21 days. Hardship signal recorded as ongoing hardship; hardship review needed per lender policy. Assessment asked the single required hardship timing question and it was answered. Do not repeat disclosures, verification, debt establishment, or the 21-day income question. Next step: phone contact to discuss available next steps for this account, with hardship review as the only live path under current policy."}

Okay, but I still can’t pay anything right now.

Under current policy, no payment arrangement fits because you’ve stated you cannot make any payment within 21 days. The only live path is hardship review for this Slice account ending in 1184. If you want, I can note that you cannot pay right now and limit follow-up to contact only if an approved hardship option becomes available.
Yes, note that—I’m unemployed and can’t commit to any payment right now.

Noted. I’ve recorded that you’re unemployed and cannot commit to any payment right now. Under current policy, hardship review is the only available path on this account. I’ll note a limited contact preference to reach out only if an approved hardship option becomes available.

No approved hardship option is available right now. Your request to limit contact has been noted, and you will be contacted only if a supported hardship option becomes available. Otherwise, the account may proceed through credit reporting review or collections review under current policy.
